command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 'cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path
JOB = \"phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2\"
jp = Path(\"memory/phase-controller/jobs\") / JOB / \"status.json\"
d = json.loads(jp.read_text())
print(\"current status:\", d.get(\"status\"))
if d.get(\"status\") == \"running\":
    d[\"status\"] = \"blocked\"
    jp.write_text(json.dumps(d, indent=2))
    print(\"Reset to blocked\")
else:
    print(\"No reset needed\")
" 2>&1'
